description: SMS notification templates and order lifecycle integration using existing sms_enabled flag and lib/sms.ts
steps: Create lib/sms/templates.ts - SMS message template functions: orderConfirmed(orderNumber, total, eta), orderDispatched(orderNumber, riderName), orderDelivered(orderNumber). Each returns a short SMS string.

Create lib/sms/notify-order.ts - Helper that checks sms_enabled feature flag via isFeatureEnabled('sms_enabled'), then sends appropriate SMS using existing lib/sms.ts sendSms function. Exports notifyOrderSms(event, phone, data) where event is 'confirmed'|'dispatched'|'delivered'. Fire-and-forget, catches all errors.
Integrate into app/api/orders/route.ts POST handler - Add notifyOrderSms('confirmed', ...) call in the Promise.allSettled block
Add test in tests/sms-templates.test.ts verifying template functions produce correct SMS strings
acceptance_criteria: lib/sms/templates.ts exports template functions for order events
lib/sms/notify-order.ts checks sms_enabled flag before sending
SMS notification is triggered in POST /api/orders (fire-and-forget)
When sms_enabled flag is false, no SMS is sent (graceful no-op)
verification: Run npx eslint . from apps/web/ and confirm no errors
Run npm run test from apps/web/ and confirm all tests pass
